description: Legal document, fragment. Dating: ca. 1020 CE. Muʾammala bt. Shemuel b. Menashshe b. Avraham al-Qazzaz releases her sister Mulūk and other relatives (probably her sister's family) from obligations concerning the estate of her aunt Ḥusn bt. Menashshe b. Ibrāhīm including properties in a place called Ṭūr Rūbā (טור רובא) and in Tyre, in the 'Armon' (mansion?) of Ibn al-Qazzāz. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי, שבר. מואמלה בת שמואל מוותרת על תביעות ירושה, בערך 1020.
